metadata.title: Restructuring & Insolvency Law
metadata.description: Official site of Attorney Mohammed Al-Dowayesh — Managing Partner at CMS Global and expert in Saudi Bankruptcy Law.

hero.name: Mohammed Al-Dowayesh
hero.title: Managing Partner | Insolvency & Restructuring Expert
hero.specialization: Specialist in Saudi Bankruptcy Law, financial restructuring, and commercial banking disputes
hero.subheadline: Representing multinational conglomerates and major corporations in complex insolvency and liquidation cases, with experience in projects exceeding $12 billion.
hero.eyebrow: Licensed Attorney · Managing Partner · International Arbitrator
hero.panel_text: Over 17 years of successful representation for major international corporations in restructuring and insolvency cases, including projects exceeding $12 billion.
hero.location_value: Riyadh — King Abdullah Financial District (KAFD), Building 1.09, 6th Floor
hero.counsel_text: Formerly at Clyde & Co and BSA LAW, with representation in international arbitration cases.
hero.profile_alt: Mohammed Al-Dowayesh — Managing Partner at CMS Global
hero.licence_badge: Ministry of Justice Licensed | Saudi Bar Association Member

services.title: Practice Areas
services.subtitle: Specialized legal counsel for major corporations and international conglomerates in the Kingdom.

insolvency.title: Restructuring & Insolvency
insolvency.description: Certified expert in Saudi Bankruptcy Law, major corporate liquidation, and creditor rights settlement.

banking.title: Banking Disputes
banking.description: Advocacy before Banking Dispute Committees in cases exceeding hundreds of millions.

arbitration.title: International Commercial Arbitration
arbitration.description: Representation in ICC international arbitration in Geneva, and as expert in Saudi law before London courts.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure & Energy (ICE)
infrastructure.description: Management of major disputes in EPC contracts, airports, railways, and petrochemical projects.

labor.title: Labor Law
labor.description: Labor bylaws drafting, HR restructuring, and contract termination under Saudi Labor Law.

investment.title: Foreign Investment
investment.description: Corporate entity formation and cross-border transaction engineering to protect foreign investments.

bank_guarantee.role: Representing Korean contractor in bank guarantee renewal

about.title: Professional Background
about.paragraph_1: Holder of LL.M. from Dedman School of Law, Southern Methodist University (SMU), Dallas, Texas, USA (2012), and Bachelor of Laws from King Saud University (2009).
about.paragraph_2: Advanced through top-tier global law firms: spent eight years as Partner at Clyde & Co, and was an associate at BSA LAW. Currently serves as Managing Partner of CMS Global in Riyadh.
about.paragraph_3: Represents multinational conglomerates and major corporations in insolvency, infrastructure, and banking claims including: Rabigh Petrochemical Complex ($8B), King Khalid International Airport ($2B), and Makkah Railway Stations ($2B).

twitter.focus: Awareness of labor law and employee/company rights

standards.title: International Tier 1 Standards
standards.description: Experience at global law firms (Clyde & Co, CMS) provides clients with Tier 1 standards comparable to London and New York firms.

financial.title: Deep Financial & Judicial Expertise
financial.description: Comprehensive understanding of forensic accounting, asset valuation, and settlement engineering in liquidation, insolvency, and billion-dollar disputes.

international.title: International & Local Influence
international.description: Ability to litigate before Saudi courts, and represent clients internationally as an expert in Saudi law before British courts and Geneva arbitration bodies.

track_record.title: Proven Billion-Dollar Track Record
track_record.description: Representing projects exceeding $12 billion, including Rabigh, King Khalid Airport, and Makkah Railways.

1.text: Al-Dowayesh possesses exceptional expertise in managing complex insolvency cases.

2.text: Precision in drafting and effectiveness in advocacy before judicial bodies.

3.text: International expertise exceeding expectations in arbitration cases.
